disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two large-volume episodes of coffee-ground (dark, granular) vomiting this evening
trigger_question_examples: What did the vomit look like?
How many times has he vomited and how much?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's vomited twice tonight and it was dark and gritty, like old coffee grounds — quite a lot each time, there's a bucket of it by the bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound weakness and orthostatic dizziness — cannot sit or stand without near-syncope (circulatory compromise proxy)
trigger_question_examples: How is he when he tries to sit or stand?
Does he feel faint or like he might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He can't sit up at all — the moment he tries, the room spins and he feels like he'll faint. He's completely drained and can't move without help.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Months of persistent upper-abdominal pain and early satiety unresponsive to antacids and a PPI
trigger_question_examples: How long has his stomach been troubling him?
Do the antacids or his tablet help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His stomach's been bad for about six months — a constant dull ache and he fills up after just a few bites. The antacids and his daily tablet haven't done a thing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked unintentional weight loss over recent months (approximately 12 kg)
trigger_question_examples: Has he lost any weight recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's lost a lot of weight — maybe 12 kilos — without trying. His clothes are hanging off him and he barely eats.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Appears pale, sweaty and clammy on the caregiver's description (peripheral shutdown proxy)
trigger_question_examples: What does his colour and skin look like?
Is he sweaty or cold and clammy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's gone really pale and washed out, and he's sweaty and clammy to touch.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No NSAID or anticoagulant use; already established on daily omeprazole with no benefit
trigger_question_examples: Is he on any blood thinners or anti-inflammatory painkillers?
What does he take for his stomach?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blood thinners and no anti-inflammatory painkillers. He just takes a daily omeprazole for his stomach and it hasn't helped.
